title: Bihar ITI CAT Admission 2026: Dates (Mar-Jun), Link, PDF & Step-by-Step Guide

detail.title: Bihar ITI CAT Admission 2026: Dates (Mar-Jun), Link, PDF & Step-by-Step Guide
detail.short_info: Bihar ITI CAT Admission 2026 registration starts March 2026 at admissions.nic.in. Download PDF, check eligibility (Class 8th/10th), fees (₹500 general), trades & full online process via BCECEB official links.

sections.heading: Bihar ITI CAT Admission 2026: Dates (Mar-Jun), Link, PDF & Step-by-Step Guide

content.text: Bihar ITI CAT Admission 2026 registration is expected to start in March 2026 via the official portal at Click Here, managed by BCECEB.

The Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB) conducts the Industrial Training Institute Common Admission Test (ITICAT), also known as Bihar ITI CAT, for entry into various government and private ITI trades across Bihar. Download the official notification PDF from Click Here for complete details on trades, seats, and rules.​

Candidates need to have passed Class 8th for non-engineering trades or Class 10th for engineering trades from a recognized board. Age limit is generally 14-40 years, with relaxations for SC/ST/OBC categories. Bihar domicile is preferred for seat reservations, but others can apply. Check the PDF for trade-specific qualifications like physical standards or prior experience.​​

sections.heading: Documents Required for Bihar ITI CAT Registration

content.text: Prepare these in scanned JPG/PDF format (usually 20-500KB):

items: Aadhaar card or any government ID.
Bihar domicile certificate (if claiming reservation). Have a valid email and mobile for registration OTP.

content.text: The application fee for Bihar ITI CAT (ITICAT) 2026 is non-refundable and paid online via debit/credit card, net banking, or UPI.

sections.heading: How to Register for Bihar ITI CAT 2026 (Step-by-Step)

content.text: Head to Click Here. Click "New Registration." Enter personal details like name, DOB, email, mobile, and captcha. Verify with OTP to get application number and password.​
Log in using your credentials. Input guardian details, address, educational qualifications, and preferred trades/ITIs. Select category and gender accurately; use block letters where needed.

sections.heading: Step 3: Upload Documents and Pay Fees

content.text: Upload photo, signature, and certificates as per guidelines. Pay the fee (approx. ₹500 general/₹250 reserved) online via debit/credit card, net banking, or UPI. Note the transaction ID.
Review all details, choose exam center if applicable, and submit. Download the filled form and payment receipt. A correction window opens in May for edits.​

sections.heading: How to Download Bihar ITI CAT 2026 Notification PDF

content.text: Visit Click here directly or check Click Here for the latest version. This PDF covers eligibility, syllabus, exam pattern, and important instructions—save it for reference.​

sections.heading: Bihar ITI CAT 2026 Application Fees and Payment

content.text: Application fee is around ₹500 for General/OBC/EWS and ₹250 for SC/ST, subject to confirmation in the notification. Payment is strictly online and non-refundable. Late fees may apply after the initial deadline—register promptly.​
